docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $835.84 FILED BY BERLIND, CURTIS W AS TO DEFENDANT MOGILEV, KIRILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-26-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $85.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MOGILEV, KIRILL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH M.FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF CRUTIS W. BERLIND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIRILL MOGILEV IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SRVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERLIND, CURTIS W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOGILEV, KIRILL $835.84 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $950.84, JUDGMENT IS FOR THE PLAINTIFF VS. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MOGILEV, KIRILL
